article_meta.title: Democracy Dies in DarknessPoliticsDonald TrumpWhite HouseDemocracy in AmericaCourts & LawNational SecurityElectionsPolit

reasoning: Generally avoids attribution violations and flags several genuine author-prose biases (unsourced claims about outrage, loaded 'militarized' term, structural slant). However, one item mislabels attributed/hedged prose as opinion-as-fact, and two items are meta-structural with non-quoted 'biasedText' phrasing. Minor overreach on omission claim.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: No flagged passages were direct quotes or clearly attributed source statements.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Item 1 overreaches by treating an attributed, hedged assessment as opinion-as-fact; the omission/slant meta items are somewhat speculative though defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Most salient author-level biases (unsourced 'mounting public outrage', loaded 'militarized') were caught; few, if any, clear misses.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: The first item should not be labeled Opinion as Fact (better as Unsubstantiated Claim if at all). Other labels are largely reasonable, though the omission/slant calls are debatable.
